# FiNAN (Filipino Nurses Association in the Nordic Region)

> Professional non-profit organization supporting and advocating for Filipino nurses across the Nordic region.

## Key Pages

- [Home](/): Mission, current priorities, and links to all major programs.
- [About](/about/): Organization background, strategic direction, and governance context.
- [Membership](/membership/): Member eligibility, benefits, and registration path.
- [Contact](/contact/): Official contact channels and inquiry options.
- [FAQ](/faq/): Common membership and organization questions.
- [Guides & Resources](/guides-resources/): Practical resources and references for nurses.

## Regional Representation Hubs

- [Kingdom of Denmark](/representation/kingdom-denmark/)
- [Denmark](/representation/denmark/)
- [Faroe Islands](/representation/faroe-islands/)
- [Finland](/representation/finland/)
- [Greenland](/representation/greenland/)
- [Iceland](/representation/iceland/)
- [Norway](/representation/norway/)
- [Sweden](/representation/sweden/)

## Content Types

- Regional representation pages (country-focused chapter information)
- Committee and partnership content
- Event and gathering pages
- Membership and organizational policy content

## Data Sources

- Maintained site content in Astro source files and typed data modules
- Ghost CMS content for blog/news sections (country-tag aware)
- Structured organization metadata and sitemap configuration in repository data files

## Freshness

- Core organizational pages are updated as needed.
- Event pages update around campaign and registration cycles.
- Blog/news content freshness depends on Ghost CMS publishing cadence.

## Full Content Index

- [Complete URL index](/llms-full.txt)
- [XML sitemap](/sitemap.xml)
